title: Trustee & Custody Operations Manager
description:
About CapBridge

CapBridge, a member of FOMO Group, is a leading digital investment platform headquartered in Singapore. As a Capital Markets Services licensee, CapBridge is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) to deal in capital markets products, including securities and collective investment schemes, and to provide custodial services. It is also an exempt financial adviser licensed to issue or promulgate analyses and reports on investment products.

CapBridge enables HNWIs and institutional clients to invest in traditional and digital assets via its one-stop digital investment platform, providing highly curated, top-quality, and institutional-grade opportunities to meet clients' diverse asset allocation needs. Through CapBridge's associated company, FOMO Pay Pte Ltd, a regulated MAS Payment Services Act (PSA) Digital Payment Token (DPT) entity, qualified clients can also invest into CapBridge curated products using DPTs, providing a seamless bridge between Traditional Finance (TradFi) and Web3 Finance.

About the Role!

As the cornerstone of our fiduciary framework, you will spearhead the end-to-end safeguarding of cash, securities, and digital assets. You will provide critical oversight for SPV and trust structures, ensuring every transaction and trustee decision is defensible, compliant, and audit-ready. This role is designed for a seasoned operations leader who can navigate complex MAS regulatory landscapes (SFA, FAA, Trust Companies Act) while driving the evolution of our custody controls and digital asset integration.

Key Responsibilities:

● Custody & Asset Safeguarding: Own the end-to-end lifecycle for traditional and digital assets, overseeing reconciliations, corporate actions, and the establishment of robust segregation frameworks.

● Fiduciary Oversight: Lead trustee administration for SPVs and trusts, interpreting complex deeds to monitor issuer obligations, covenants, and formal trustee actions.

● Regulatory & Risk Governance: Act as the first-line owner for MAS compliance (SFA, FAA, TCA); partner with Compliance on inspections and maintain rigorous incident remediation plans.

● Onboarding & AML Oversight: Direct the due diligence and KYC/KYB assessments for issuers and intermediaries, ensuring all counterparties align with internal risk appetite.

● Reporting & Audit Readiness: Serve as the primary contact for auditors and regulators, ensuring all records are inspection-ready and presenting periodic governance reports to senior management.

● Strategic Transformation: Lead workflow automation and UAT for new systems, translating regulatory requirements into scalable operational designs for new asset classes.

Requirements:

● Experience: 8–10+ years in Custody Operations, Trustee Administration, or Asset Servicing.

● Regulatory Expertise: Deep knowledge of MAS frameworks (SFA, FAA, Trust Companies Act, and relevant Notices).

● Technical Breadth: Proven experience with SPV structures and capital markets; exposure to Digital Assets or Tokenized Securities is a strong advantage.

● Operational Mindset: Demonstrated ability to act as an independent control owner with a high degree of "audit-ready" documentation discipline.

● Leadership: Experience coaching junior team members and managing complex stakeholder relationships across Legal, Tech, and Senior Management.

● Industry Background: Prior experience in regulated FinTech, Trust Companies, or Fund Administration is highly preferred.

Our Perks and Benefits:

● Competitive Compensation and Benefit Package

● Group Hospitalisation and Medical Insurance

● Fun and Dynamic Environment with plenty of learning and growth opportunities

● Career Advancement

● Professional Development Training Workshops

● Team Building Sessions

postedCompany.description:
CapBridge (www.capbridge.sg) is a capital raising platform dedicated to financing promising high growth companies globally, with a focus in Asia. Combining advanced financial technologies ("Fintech") with comprehensive service throughout the investment and development horizon, CapBridge facilities opportunities between mid to late-stage high growth companies, accredited investors and strategic buyers across industry sectors.

 

CapBridge is based in Singapore, featuring a premier geographic presence, an unparalleled legacy of growth, and superior access to the global financing markets. We seek to transform the manner in which capital is invested – and value is realized – throughout the emerging growth community by:

 

  • Syndicating and reducing risk of growth capital investing
  • Achieve greater portfolio diversification through exclusive and proprietary deal flow
  • Expanding access to capital for Entrepreneurs and promising high growth companies

 

CapBridge is well positioned through its extensive experience in developing a world-class capital markets system, championing the interests of Entrepreneurs and high growth companies, and successfully financing many of the promising growth companies in the world. If you are looking to make a difference in an exciting and fast-paced company, please submit your CV to admin@capbridge.sg. The role is based in Singapore and extensive travelling is expected. We offer attractive remuneration with commission and the opportunity to grow a team.
postedCompany.name: CAPBRIDGE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
